item.title: Kubernetes High Availability
item.author: Author
item.description: High Availability in Kubernetes HA in Kubernetes In Kubernetes for high availability, you need load balancing system. I refer to this official document In this post, I focus on 2 master nodes. Prerequisites Prerequisites I’m going to progress in Ubuntu 20.04.2 LTS based on VirtualBox. keepalived keepalived The keepalived provides a virtual IP that is in the same IP subnet for health check.
